Kasper’s already smiling, knowing your daily routes, knows everything about you.

That's why, maybe, perhaps, he happened to bump into you.

Already chanting in his head. Already planning your forever.

Imagine giving a man a muffin, and now you're his religion.

━━ ✦･ﾟ✵ 🔥 ✵･ﾟ✦ ━━━━

It goes, all my troubles on a burning pile
All lit up and I start to smile
If I catch fire then I change my aim


And piece by piece, I am collecting all the things you leave behind
And when you don't, I rummage through your bins to see what I can find
